DmcaDescriptionParagraph1: This DMCA Policy outlines PrTask's procedures for handling copyright infringement claims under the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (17 U.S.C. 512) and the EU Copyright Directive (Directive 2019/790). As a platform where developers submit code through pull requests, PrTask takes intellectual property protection seriously. We maintain a registered DMCA agent, implement a notice-and-takedown process, provide counter-notification procedures, and enforce a repeat infringer policy to protect both copyright holders and legitimate contributors.
DmcaDescriptionParagraph2: If you believe that code submitted through PrTask infringes on your copyright, this policy explains how to file a takedown notice with the required information. If your code was removed and you believe the takedown was in error, the counter-notification process allows you to contest the removal. PrTask processes all DMCA requests promptly and fairly, balancing the rights of copyright holders with the legitimate contributions of developers. For copyright-related inquiries, contact our designated DMCA agent using the information provided in this policy.
DmcaDesignatedAgentDescription: DMCA notices and counter-notifications should be sent to our designated agent: PrTask DMCA Agent, Email: dmca@prtask.com. Our designated agent information is registered with the U.S. Copyright Office as required by 17 U.S.C. 512(c)(2). You may also reach our designated agent by mail at the address listed on our Contact page.
DmcaEuCopyrightDescription: In compliance with Article 17 of the EU Copyright Directive (Directive 2019/790), PrTask cooperates with rights holders and maintains a complaint and redress mechanism for copyright disputes. PrTask makes best efforts to obtain authorization for user-uploaded content where required and implements effective measures to prevent the availability of infringing content upon receiving notice from rights holders. Users whose content is affected by copyright enforcement actions have the right to file a complaint through our internal mechanism.
DmcaFilingDescription: If you believe that content on PrTask infringes your copyright, please send a written notification to our designated agent with the following information:
DmcaFilingItem1: A physical or electronic signature of the copyright owner or authorized agent
DmcaFilingItem2: Identification of the copyrighted work claimed to have been infringed
DmcaFilingItem3: Identification of the material that is claimed to be infringing, with sufficient detail to locate it on PrTask
DmcaFilingItem4: Your contact information including address, telephone number, and email address
DmcaFilingItem5: A statement that you have a good faith belief that use of the material is not authorized by the copyright owner, its agent, or the law
DmcaFilingItem6: A statement, under penalty of perjury, that the information in the notification is accurate and that you are authorized to act on behalf of the copyright owner
DmcaOverviewDescription: PrTask respects the intellectual property rights of others and expects its users to do the same. In accordance with the Digital Millennium Copyright Act of 1998 (DMCA), we will respond promptly to claims of copyright infringement committed using our platform.
DmcaRepeatInfringersDescription: PrTask maintains a repeat infringer policy as required for DMCA safe harbor protection. Users who receive two or more valid DMCA takedown notices will have their accounts permanently terminated. PrTask reserves the right to terminate accounts of repeat infringers at its sole discretion, even on a first offense in egregious cases. Terminated users forfeit any pending bounties and are permanently barred from creating new accounts.
DmcaSafeHarborDescription: PrTask qualifies for safe harbor protection under Section 512 of the Digital Millennium Copyright Act (17 U.S.C. 512) as an online service provider. PrTask has registered a designated DMCA agent with the U.S. Copyright Office, implements and publishes a notice-and-takedown process, maintains a counter-notification procedure, has adopted and reasonably implements a repeat infringer policy, and accommodates standard technical measures used by copyright owners to identify or protect copyrighted works.
DmcaTakedownDescription: Upon receipt of a valid DMCA takedown notice, PrTask will expeditiously remove or disable access to the allegedly infringing material, notify the user who posted the content, and provide that user with a copy of the notice and information about how to file a counter-notification. PrTask will act promptly upon receiving a valid notice and will preserve evidence related to the allegedly infringing material for the duration of any dispute.
DownloadDescriptionHeading: Download PrTask — Available on Multiple Platforms
DownloadDescriptionParagraph1: PrTask is available as a native application on multiple platforms, giving you the flexibility to manage tasks, review pull requests, and track payments from your preferred device. The Android app provides a full-featured mobile experience with offline support, push notifications, and biometric authentication. The Windows desktop application offers a native experience with system tray integration and local file access. Linux users can download the standalone binary for x64 systems, and the web application is always accessible at prtask.com from any modern browser.
DownloadDescriptionParagraph2: Each platform version of PrTask shares the same core functionality built with .NET MAUI and Blazor technology, ensuring a consistent experience across devices. Native apps offer additional capabilities like offline access to cached task data, push notifications for pull request reviews and payment updates, and biometric login for enhanced security. The web application requires no installation and works on any device with a modern browser, making it the fastest way to get started. iOS and macOS versions are currently in development and will be available in a future release.
DownloadDescriptionParagraph3: Installation is straightforward on all supported platforms. Android users can download the APK directly and enable installation from unknown sources in their device settings. Windows users download the executable and run it — no installer required. Linux users download the binary, set the executable permission, and run it from the terminal. All downloads are verified and signed to ensure authenticity. Check the feature comparison table above to understand which capabilities are available on each platform, and refer to the troubleshooting section if you encounter any issues during installation.
DownloadInstallAndroidDescription: Download the APK file, open it on your device, and follow the on-screen prompts to install.
DownloadInstallIosDescription: Download from the App Store and tap Install. The app will appear on your home screen.
DownloadInstallLinuxDescription: Download the package for your distribution and install using your package manager.
DownloadInstallMacDescription: Download the DMG file, drag PrTask to your Applications folder, and launch from Launchpad.
DownloadInstallWindowsDescription: Download the installer, run the setup wizard, and follow the prompts to complete installation.
DownloadMacDescription: Native Mac app for Apple Silicon and Intel.
DownloadMacRequirements: macOS 12 (Monterey) or later, 100 MB available storage
DownloadTroubleshootApk: Enable 'Install from unknown sources' in your device settings, then try the download again.
DownloadTroubleshootApkQuestion: The Android APK will not install. What should I do?
DownloadTroubleshootCrash: Ensure your device meets the minimum system requirements and that you have the latest version installed.
DownloadTroubleshootCrashQuestion: The app crashes on startup. How can I fix this?
HowItWorksClientsStep1: Sign in with GitHub or Google and set up your payment method
HowItWorksClientsStep2: Create a task with a description, repository link, and bounty amount
HowItWorksClientsStep3: Developers submit public pull requests for your task
HowItWorksClientsStep4: Review all submitted pull requests and approve the best one
HowItWorksClientsStep5: You are automatically charged the bounty and the developer gets paid
HowItWorksDescriptionHeading: How PrTask Works — Complete Guide to Earning and Hiring
HowItWorksDescriptionParagraph1: PrTask streamlines the process of connecting developers with paid software work through a pull request-based workflow that mirrors how professional development teams already operate. The process begins with signing up using your GitHub, Google, Microsoft, or Okta account, which takes seconds and requires no separate registration form. Once authenticated, developers can immediately browse available tasks, while clients can start creating tasks and setting bounties right away. The entire lifecycle from task creation to payment disbursement follows a predictable, transparent workflow with clear steps at every stage.
HowItWorksDescriptionParagraph2: For developers, the workflow is straightforward: browse tasks, find one matching your skills, review the requirements and linked GitHub repository, implement the solution in your own fork, and submit a pull request through PrTask. The task owner reviews your code following standard GitHub review practices, may request changes, and ultimately approves and merges your contribution. Upon merge, payment is triggered automatically — no invoicing, no payment requests, no waiting for manual processing. The bounty is disbursed directly to your configured payout method.
HowItWorksDescriptionParagraph3: For clients, PrTask simplifies the hiring process by eliminating interviews, contracts, and scope negotiations. Create a task with a clear description, set the complexity level and bounty amount, link it to your GitHub repository, and publish it to the marketplace. Developers worldwide can then discover and work on your task. You review submissions as pull requests with full code diff visibility, request changes if needed, and approve when satisfied. The platform handles payment processing, developer verification, and dispute resolution, letting you focus on reviewing code quality rather than managing freelancer relationships.
HowItWorksWorkflowDescription: Follow these steps to complete the full workflow from login to payment.
HowItWorksWorkflowStep10Description: Add inline comments on specific lines or highlighted code that need changes.
HowItWorksWorkflowStep11Description: Developer applies fixes, replies to comments, and resolves them.
HowItWorksWorkflowStep12Description: Client approves the PR and pays the bounty via Maya credit card checkout.
HowItWorksWorkflowStep12Heading: Approve PR and Pay via Maya
HowItWorksWorkflowStep13Description: View all payment transactions and their status.
HowItWorksWorkflowStep14Description: Configure payout method and verify withdrawal balance.
HowItWorksWorkflowStep1Description: Authenticate with Google, GitHub, Microsoft, or Okta.
HowItWorksWorkflowStep2Description: Complete identity verification to enable payments and comply with regulations.
HowItWorksWorkflowStep3Description: Post a task with a bounty for developers to complete.
HowItWorksWorkflowStep4Description: Upload the source code folder to the task so developers can see the diff.
HowItWorksWorkflowStep5Description: Developers browse available tasks and find work that matches their skills.
HowItWorksWorkflowStep6Description: View the task description, bounty amount, and existing pull requests.
HowItWorksWorkflowStep7Description: Edit the source code directly in the browser diff editor.
